creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 243586
v0.18.16

esbuild is currently 35 releases behind, so the attached patch brings it up-to-date. Poudriere and go test are happy.

I recognize that esbuild cuts releases at breakneck speed, but behind 35 is a large enough number that I'm wondering whether you were holding off on updates intentionally? If so, please feel free to close this PR.

I use esbuild pretty heavily and some of the more recent features would be nice to have in the port.

Thanks!
